game_name: Shadow Dancer: The Secret of Shinobi

audio_identity.overall_style: Good quality arcade-style game music and sound effects, though not reaching the standards of Revenge of Shinobi
distinctive_elements: Compared negatively to predecessor in music quality

notes: Data Tier T2 (empirical/qualitative). No detailed tempo, key, chord progression, or per-area SFX characteristics documented in available sources. Wikipedia review mentions 'The music and sound effects are good, though not up to Revenge of Shinobi's standards' but provides no technical specifications.
